title: Origins: Crystal Weaver
description: An Origins Datapack that adds the Crystal Weaver, an arachnid that can make warp webs.
body:
## 🔮 Crystal Weaver 🔮
This arachnid spins crystals to create a web of warps.

‼️1.20.1 version requires [Overgrown's Sync](https://modrinth.com/mod/sync)!!

## ✨Powerlist✨

<details>
<summary>Warping Web</summary>
You can weave end crystals to create a warp point.

Charge with Primary key.

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>
Warp Crystals (End Crystals) do not damage any blocks or entities when destoyed. (Unless you're on creative, be careful when testing).

When destroyed, the cooldown is refunded.
</details>
</details>

<details>
<summary>Interlink</summary>
While sneaking, look at a Warp Crystal to teleport to it.

Charge with Primary key.

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>
Warp Crystals are visible and may be teleported to through walls.
They have a range of ~64 blocks.
</details>
</details>

<details>
<summary>Climbing</summary>
You are able to climb up any kind of wall, not just ladders.

Toggle with Secondary key.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Hydrophobia</summary>
You receive damage over time while in contact with water.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Fragile</summary>
You have 3 less hearts of health than humans.

</details>
